green_tea_leaves.name: Green Tea Leaves
green_tea_leaves.desc: Fresh green leaves. Highly demanded by tea masters.

wild_root.name: Wild Root
wild_root.desc: A crunchy root foraged from muddy ponds.

wind_feather.name: Wind Feather
wind_feather.desc: A glossy dark feather carrying currents of wind.

demon_horn.name: Demon Horn
demon_horn.desc: A heavy, dark crimson horn vibrating with power.

demon_kings_sword.name: Demon King's Sword
demon_kings_sword.desc: A blade of singular malice, forged from cooling star-fire and quenched in the blood of fallen monarchs.

horned_demon_helmet.name: Horned Demon Helmet
horned_demon_helmet.desc: Forged from blackened iron and etched with infernal runes, this jagged helm is topped by a pair of obsidian-like horns that pulse with a faint, rhythmic crimson light. Adds +12 Defense.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.desc: A round wooden shield reinforced with iron rings. Adds +2 Defense.

lucky_amulet.name: Lucky Amulet
lucky_amulet.desc: A protective temple amulet. Adds +1 Attack and +1 Defense.

mana_sever_dagger.name: Mana Sever Dagger
mana_sever_dagger.desc: This ritual blade is crafted from a single, translucent shard of void-glass that hums with a dissonant, jagged vibration.

einherjars_will.name: Einherjar Will
einherjars_will.desc: Here stands all the souls and blood of those send to eternal rest by Valhalla elite army. We shall honor the bond of those who share our war home will. Peace to all fallen souls.

behelit_sword.name: Behelit Sword
behelit_sword.desc: Through time it shears the wrath of doom, A swords resolve cursed ever higher. The Behelit Sword, in midnights gloom, cuts open Hell on wings of desire.

virtue.name: Virtue
virtue.desc: This relic is a masterclass in conflicting design, blending the divine aesthetics of high-paladin armor with the chaotic, aggressive edges of the abyss.

stick.name: Wooden stick
stick.desc: A simple, unadorned length of branch, roughly hewn and stripped of its bark.

steel_dagger.name: Steel Dagger
steel_dagger.desc: A utilitarian blade forged from tempered steel, possessing a clean, minimalist profile.

t1_healing_potion.name: low healing potion
t1_healing_potion.desc: Contained within a small, unadorned glass vial, this thin, translucent liquid glows with a faint, pale amber hue.

basic_spear.name: Wooden Spear
basic_spear.desc: A functional, no-nonsense weapon consisting of a straight, seasoned ash wood shaft topped with a simple iron spearhead.

star-fall_reaver.name: star-fall reaver
star-fall_reaver.desc: It is a piece of the heavens brought to earth to carve a path through the dark.

the_eternal_blade.name: The Eternal Blade
the_eternal_blade.desc: It does not care for the history of those it strikes, for it has seen the end of all things and remains unchanged.

light-eater.name: Light-Eater
light-eater.desc: It is the silence before the first word, the stillness before the first breath. It remembers a time when the world was young, and it is waiting for it to be born again.
